label: Headlesshost Knowledgebase
description: The Headelesshost knowledgebase template can be used to create a simple documentation website using Headlesshost and Next.js.
summary: Use this dossier when building a documentation or knowledge-base site backed by Headlesshost content APIs. It provides the server-side data access layer, shared content types, and the minimal Next.js root layout patterns needed to fetch site structure, pages, guide data, authors, and search results from a Headlesshost site ID.

envVars.purpose: Headelesshost content site id. For more information, see https://react-nextjs-knowledgebase.vercel.app/knowledgebase/dp_local
